notes.design: Two-pass: Pass 1 = dartdoc index.json (types/extensions/members), Pass 2 = barrel-constrained enum-value regex (fills one dartdoc gap). Same pattern as typescript-hybrid-extractor.py v0.3.0-hybrid.
notes.bug_fixed_in_pass2: Single-line enum check set in_enum_values=False even when body_m was None (multi-line enum starting on same line as declaration). Fixed: in_enum_values=False only inside the 'if body_m:' block.

enum_values.note: net -1 because 2 old entries (AmityCommunityPostSettings.isPostReviewEnabled/onlyAdminCanPost) were regex false positives (final fields of enhanced enum constructor, not constants); +60 .values synthetic from dartdoc
